name: Spinach & Leek Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Canned water chestnuts, drained, rinsed, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or heavy soup pot on high heat for 30 seconds.
2. Add the oil and swirl to coat.
3. Add garlic, leeks, carrots, and lower to a simmer. Cook, covered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Uncover the wok and increase the heat to high. Add spinach and water chestnuts. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Lower the heat to medium. Add warmed stock, tamari, and rice vinegar. Season to taste.
6. Heat through but do not boil. Serve immediately, garnished with tofu strips.
"Sundays at Moosewood Restaurant Cookbook"
